description: next/ v4 — REAL ERP (erpdb.llm_test_v3.kundenauftraege) projected onto the Level-4 SMProfile-CustomerOrder. Replaces the sim-v5-erp-orders REST projection in the live cutover (FA…-keyspace, real status vocab). status valueMap normalises the German title-case ERP dialect (Offen/Bestätigt/…) onto the canonical constraint vocabulary (offen/bestaetigt/…) so the single-entity order_overdue constraint (when status eq 'offen', require due_date gte $now) stays source-agnostic — no per-source casing in the profile. The real ERP carries NO order-total column: order value = menge × stueckpreis, so quantity (menge) + unit_price (stueckpreis) are mapped and the it-evaluator derives total_amount = quantity × unit_price for the deviation €-impact ranking. filter excludes the two terminal-closed states (Versandt/Storniert) → active order book. NOTE: in the real ERP the CustomerOrder→ProductionOrder TRIGGERS FK lives on kundenauftraege.production_order_no (inverse of the Sim, where ProductionOrder.sales_order_ref carried it) — the cross-source deviation joins (OperationsResponse↔ProductionOrder on production_order_no) don't depend on it; the KG TRIGGERS edge is built from the fkColumn above.
